assertions.text: The agent recognizes this as a request to upgrade the vendored OpenHarness stack.
The agent performs a fast-forward-only git pull of the OpenHarness vendor.
The slash command invokes the OpenHarness upgrade workflow.
The agent uses a fast-forward-only pull and reports the result.
The agent updates the vendored OpenHarness stack via a fast-forward-only pull.
The agent reports the upgraded OpenHarness state.
